---
name: Good first issue (maintainer seed)
about: Small, scoped task for new contributors — use when opening community backlog items
title: "[Good first] "
labels: community, good first issue
---

## Goal

One sentence: what should be true when this is done?

## Out of scope

What should the contributor **not** change?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1 (e.g. `pytest tests/ -q` passes)
- [ ] Criterion 2 (e.g. CLI command or test proves behavior)

## How to verify

```bash
# commands a contributor can run
pytest tests/ -q
```

## Estimated difficulty

- [ ] S (&lt;1 hour)
- [ ] M (half day)
- [ ] L (multi-day — usually not good-first)

## Additional context

Links to files, docs, or related issues.
